curation_notes: Re-curated. Patch is PR #1217 (rebase-merged as 4 commits, feature branch tip ec22294e). The core fix is in tremor-script/src/interpreter/expr.rs which removed the patch_in_place and merge_in_place functions that used unsafe transmute to convert immutable references to mutable ones for in-place optimization. Supporting changes removed PatchInPlace/MergeInPlace AST variants from ast.rs, base_expr.rs, raw.rs, and to_static.rs, and fixed state handling in tremor-cli/src/run.rs. Six non-test source files were changed, making the patch noisy. Locations derived from the patch diff focusing on the two functions containing the unsafe code. Vulnerability class use-after-free confirmed from CWE-416 and the patch diff.
